summary: Resolve approval-chain assignees dynamically from current project configuration and refresh approval views when project roles change.

notes: Approval-chain projection now fills waiting, active, reapproval, and historically skipped empty assignees from the current data-driven graph resolver.
Future approval nodes no longer display unresolved assignees when the project owner configuration already has a matching employee.
Historical empty assignee records with assignee_user_id=0 are supplemented by current role resolution for display.
Approval-chain cards no longer show the internal fallback label '待解析'. Truly missing configuration is shown as '未配置'.
Realtime invalidation now refreshes approval views when project_roles changes.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.9.
Run deploy/scripts/verify-jwt-keys.sh on the cloud host.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host before deployment.
After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.9.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.9.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
